comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Started implementation. Immediate steps: switch to feature/biblicus-reinforcement-memory, merge current dev into it, inspect the existing Biblicus-backed FeedbackAnalysis path, then add a separate ExplanationAnalysis block over ScoreResult.explanation.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
Implemented on feature/biblicus-reinforcement-memory after merging current dev into the branch.

Changes made:
- added backend report block `ExplanationAnalysis` over production `ScoreResult.explanation`
- added shared reinforcement helper module for item identifier hydration and normal ScoreResult filtering
- updated `FeedbackAnalysis` to use shared identifier helper
- updated `VectorTopicMemory` to delegate ScoreResult filtering heuristic to shared helper
- added dashboard `ExplanationAnalysis` block component with compacted-output attachment loading
- registered/exported the new dashboard block
- added Python tests for ScoreResult filtering/grouping, topic output with identifiers/root cause, and best-effort failure handling
- added Jest test for the dashboard ExplanationAnalysis block render + attached output loading

Verification:
- `PYTHONPATH=/Users/ryan/Projects/Biblicus/src:$PYTHONPATH pytest -q plexus/reports/blocks/explanation_analysis_test.py plexus/reports/blocks/vector_topic_memory_test.py -k "explanation_analysis or score_result_no_explanation_source"` ✅
- `PATH=/Users/ryan/.nvm/versions/node/v22.6.0/bin:$PATH npm test -- --runInBand components/blocks/__tests__/ExplanationAnalysis.test.tsx` ✅
- `python -m py_compile plexus/reports/blocks/explanation_analysis.py plexus/reports/blocks/reinforcement_helpers.py` ✅

Note: the dashboard-wide `npm run typecheck` did not complete cleanly in this environment, so verification was limited to the targeted Jest test plus Python checks.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Validation phase: preparing to run a live 60-day FeedbackAnalysis report for scorecard 1438 on feature/biblicus-reinforcement-memory to confirm the Biblicus-backed memory path works end-to-end. If the run fails, I will debug and patch the branch before re-running.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Found that the repository .env defines Plexus API settings and PLEXUS_ACCOUNT_KEY=call-criteria, but the shell session on this machine did not have them loaded. Investigating the client/auth path, then rerunning the 60-day FeedbackAnalysis report under the expected env.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Confirmed the local repository env contains the required Plexus API/account variables; rerunning under that env now. Next result should isolate whether there is an actual FeedbackAnalysis/Biblicus runtime issue.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Observed that the unauthorized error is raised during GraphQL schema introspection inside the client, before the actual account lookup completes. Testing whether disabling fetch_schema_from_transport allows normal queries and report execution on this API.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Confirmed the issue is not schema introspection. Even direct Account.get_by_key is unauthorized with the current local Plexus API credentials on this machine. Searching for the active credential/config source used elsewhere in this repo/environment so the report can actually execute.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: User refreshed the stale Plexus API key on this machine. Rerunning account resolution and the live 60-day FeedbackAnalysis report for scorecard 1438 now to surface the next real runtime issue, if any.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Live 60-day FeedbackAnalysis report for scorecard 1438 launched successfully after API credential refresh. FeedbackAnalysis is processing scores and mismatch memory analysis without Biblicus runtime failure; now polling task/report status to confirm completion and capture IDs cleanly.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Live FeedbackAnalysis validation succeeded on 2026-03-16. Report ID: ca1f599d-e510-4bec-a4a2-93e29cf55ff9. Task ID: 0f6b8bc3-5a99-42d7-8d0c-5c636b986f35. The 60-day run for scorecard 1438 completed successfully after refreshing the stale Plexus API key. The migrated Biblicus reinforcement-memory path executed end-to-end, produced per-score indexed feedback attachments plus memories.yaml, and did not require code changes.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting batch execution of the 60-day FeedbackAnalysis report across all SelectQuote scorecards. First step: resolve the target scorecards from the Plexus API, then launch one report per scorecard and record report/task IDs plus any failures.
